content:
Thanks to fjantsa <@1280181546527096993>, we now have a, fully functional, **site to Plan and Organize your teams with both units and wheels! (everything really)**
It can be found in https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/, the teams are saved in your browser, and you can **export them directly in game**, or as a file to open in another builder page (can also make a png of your full roster).
You can personalize what you have in the roster in the **Collection** section.
There is also a **full Database for all the units** (that will continue to be updated and refined in time).

If you have feedbacks, free to share.
